contentList.content: Your <LSTag Tooltip="ProficiencyBonus">Proficiency Bonus</LSTag> is added to your Initiative rolls, and you can't be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SURPRISED">Surprised</LSTag>.
When you cast a damaging cantrip, add your <LSTag Tooltip="Wisdom">Wisdom</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityModifier">Modifier</LSTag> to the damage it deals.
Spells that cost an action cost a bonus action instead.
Spells that only target 1 creature can target an additional creature.
Step through the shadows, teleporting to an unoccupied space you can see.
